desc:
Temple of the Bull
Written March 1994
22 rooms
7 mobs
10 regular objs
4 god objs

These areas are FREE- however, if you use them:
1. Feel free to make whatever modifications you need, change mobs,
objects, room descriptions etc.- but please make sure that signs and author
references are unmodified and readable by players.
2. Please send me an e-mail message if you do use them, I'd just
like to have some idea of where they end up (please include mud site)- my
address is wjp@@hopper.unh.edu until Sept 1996
3. If you redistribute these areas, please make sure this README
file goes with them :)

Bill Pelletier
wjp@@hopper.unh.edu
Aten/Talisman of GenericMUD
name: Aten's Zone Description Room

desc:
You are travelling across a great grassy field.  The wind blows softly,
causing the ripe ends of the grass stalks to bob lazily back and forth.  To the
north you spy what appears to be some sort of temple, its great white walls
blazing with the light of the sun.

exits.desc: You see the entrance to the temple.

extra_descs.desc: Looks like an average grass stalk.  You pluck one and put it in your mouth.

name: A Grassy Field

desc:
The dazzling white stone walls of the temple momentarily blind you.  Great
columns are spaced evenly around the perimeter of the temple, and an arch
beckons you inside.

exits.desc: There is an arch to the north.
Looks like a field back there.

name: Before the Temple

desc:
Your eyes slowly adjust to the level of darkness under the protective shade
of the arch.  To the north is a great marble door, which seems to be the best
way to get inside the temple.  "Why the heck to I want to go in there ?", you
think to yourself.  You shrug your shoulders and suddenly get the feeling that
you are being watched.

exits.desc: You see a great marble door.  It has a VERY nice polish.
You see a spot to stand before the temple.

extra_descs.desc: It is a remarkably well polished marble door.

name: Under the Arch

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floor, the walls, the ceiling.....

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You see a room in the temple.

name: The Temple

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floors, the walls, the ceiling.....

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You see the archway.

name: The Temple

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floor, the walls, the ceiling.....

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You see a room in the temple.

name: The Temple

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floor, the walls, the ceiling.....

exits.desc: There is a stairwell to the north.
You see a small garden to the east.
You see a room in the temple.

name: The Temple

desc:
Beautiful green plants wind around bamboo poles here, leaves outfolded to
catch the sun's rays coming in from the open sky.  The smell of rich dark earth
overwhelms your senses, and a small brook winds beneath your feet.

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You see a room in the temple.
You see a room in the temple.

extra_descs.desc: What a nice little bubbling brook!
They seem to be doing very well, someone around here has a green thumb.

name: The Atrium and Gardens

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floor, the walls, the ceiling.....

exits.desc: There seems to be a stairwell to the north.
You see a room in the temple.
There is a small garden over there.

name: The Temple

desc:
There is a beautiful curving stairwell leading upwards.  It seems to have
been carved directly from stone.

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You can't really see much up those stairs.

name: The Stairwell

desc:
The echo of your footsteps reverberates through the temple.  Everything is
white, the tiled floor, the walls, the ceiling.....  There is a nice framed
sign on the north wall.

exits.desc: There is a small garden to the south.

extra_descs.desc:
*-*-* Temple of the Bull *-*-*
   *                            *
   *        Written by:         *
   *    Aten of GenericMUD      *
   *        March 1994          *
   *                            *
   *-*-*-*-* o==[=====- *-*-*-*-*

name: The Temple

desc:
There is a beautiful curving stairwell leading upwards.  It seems to have
been carved directly from stone.

exits.desc: You see a room in the temple.
You can't really see much up those stairs.

name: The Stairwell

desc:
You find yourself in a small room atop the stairs.  Strangely enough, this
part of the temple has decorations.  The walls are covered with murals and
furs.  A corridor leads off the the south, and the stairs offer a retreat
downwards.

exits.desc: You see a corridor.
You see the bottom of the stairs.

extra_descs.desc: The mural shows a great shaggy beast with two pointed horns.
The fur is brown, short, and coarse.

name: The Upper Temple

desc:
You find yourself in a small, cramped chamber.  A window is set in the north
wall, and a sturdy oak door is to the west.

exits.desc: There is an oak door there.

extra_descs.desc: The window overlooks a grassy field.

name: Mateon's Chamber

desc:
You find yourself atop a flight of stairs.  A sturdy oak door is to the
west, a corridor leads south, and the stairs offer a path downwards.

exits.desc: Looks like a corridor.
There is an oak door there.
You see the bottom of the stairs.

name: The Upper Temple

desc:
You are standing in a drafty corridor.  There is a window set in the west
wall, and a balcony to the east protects you from falling down into the
gardens.

exits.desc: You see the stairway.
Woah..looks like a dead end.  You get the chills.

extra_descs.desc: Its a simple piece of polished wood.  You can see the gardens below.
The window overlooks a grassy field.

name: The Corridor

desc:
You are standing in a comfortable chamber.  Sunlight streams in the the open
windows, and a warm spring breeze ruffles your hair.  Thick furs cover the
stone walls and floor.  A stained oak table dominates the center of the room,
and couches line the walls.  You look out the window and are vaguely surprised
that you can't see the ground.
name: Aten's Chamber

desc:
You are standing in a drafty corridor.  There is a window set in the east
wall, and a balcony to the west protects you from falling into the gardens.

exits.desc: You see the stairway.
Can't really see much..its rather dark over there.

extra_descs.desc: The window looks down upon a grassy field.
Its a simple piece of polished wood.  You can see the gardens below.

name: The Corridor

desc:
The corridor comes to an abrupt halt here, and the only exit appears to be
back the way you came.

exits.desc: You see the corridor.

name: The Cul-de-Sac

desc:
This room is in TOTAL dissaray.  Items seem to have been swept of the room's
numerous shelves and just dumped on the floor.  The room has an unfamiliar
smell, and you wrinkle your nose in disgust.  An great sliding window is open
to the south and leads to the balcony, and a heavy iron door is to the east.

exits.desc: A heavy iron door is there.
You see the balcony over there.

extra_descs.desc: The shelves have been swept clean.
Its a great, big walk-through window.

name: The Bull's Chamber

desc:
You are in a shadowy chamber, and the hairs at the back of your neck begin
to rise.  There is so little light in this room that you start to imagine
things..  Or do you?  You know for certain that you spotted a door to the west
when you first entered.

exits.desc: You see the corridor.
A heavy iron door is there.

name: The Dark Chamber

desc:
You sense that you have reached journey's end.  The balcony overlooks a
great grassy field.  The sun's rays blind you, and you hear a snort.

exits.desc: You see the Bull's Chamber.

name: The Balcony
